title: GEEPAS Lint Remover | Rechargeable Fabric Shaver for Clothes Wool Cotton Upholstery Pills | Portable Bobble Remover Battery Operated 40Min Runtime Auto Shut-Off Detachable Collector 2 Yr Warranty Blue
features: ✅ PORTABLE & TRAVEL-FRIENDLY DESIGN-Take this bobble remover for clothes wherever you go. Its compact, lightweight body makes it ideal for on-the-go use—perfect for trips, office, or quick touch-ups before important events or meetings. Always look polished with zero hassle!

✅ RUST-RESISTANT STAINLESS STEEL BLADES-Equipped with sharp, durable stainless steel blades that resist corrosion and stay effective longer. De bobbler for clothes safely removes bobbles and lint from all kinds of fabrics while protecting your clothes from snags or damage. Reliable for everyday use.

✅ DETACHABLE LINT COLLECTOR FOR EASY CLEANING-Enjoy a mess-free experience! The built-in lint container collects fuzz neatly while you work. It’s easy to detach, empty, and clean—so you can maintain optimal performance without hassle. Fluff remover for clothes is great for quick cleaning between uses.

✅ ELECTRIC MOTOR FOR SMOOTH RESULTS-This fabric shaver for clothes' high-performance motor removes fuzz quickly and evenly. No tugging or snagging—just smooth, flawless clothes in minutes. Whether it’s your jumper, sofa or coat, refresh your fabrics with minimal effort.

✅ SUITABLE FOR VARIOUS FABRICS & ITEMS-Use clothes bobble remover on wool, cotton, synthetic fibres, upholstery, bed sheets, blankets, sweaters and more. This shaver glides easily over different textures, making it your go-to tool for refreshing home fabrics and daily wardrobe essentials.

✅ RECHARGEABLE FOR LONG-LASTING USE – Powered by a 3W motor and advanced Type-C charging, this fabric shaver runs for 40–60 minutes on a single charge. Easily de-bobble clothes, sweaters, and upholstery anytime. The built-in sweater diffuser ensures gentle, effective fabric care.

✅ SAFE TO USE AROUND KIDS – AUTOMATIC STOP-With child safety in mind, the debobbler clothes shaver automatically stops when the protective cover is removed. This feature ensures it won’t accidentally activate in little hands, offering peace of mind to parents while being efficient for adults.

✅ GENTLE ON FABRICS YET EFFECTIVE-Gentle enough for delicate garments, strong enough for tough bobbles. The protective mesh ensures your clothes stay safe while the efficient motor and blades work together for maximum lint removal. Keep clothes fresh and damage-free with lint shaver.
description: Product Description NO MORE FABRIC PILLS Effectively eliminate unwanted fabric imperfections, such as pills, fuzz and bobbles. TRAVEL FRIENDLY Geepas Lint remover is compact size and travel friendly. PRECISION BLADES Rust resistant blades designed for longevity and efficiency. RECHARGEABLE BATTERY Working time of 40-60 minutes, convenient charging via type-C. DETACHABLE LINT COLLECTOR The detachable dust box collects all the removed lint, making it easy to dispose of and clean. SUITABLE FOR VARIOUS FABRICS Suitable for all types of garments and fabrics, sweaters, jerseys, blankets, bed sheets, couches, and more. AUTOMIC STOP The automatic stop feature prevents the device from operating without the protective cover in place. WITH CHILD PROTECTION Safety is a top priority with the Geepas Lint Remover, the child protection cover ensuring it is safe to use around children.
